conbody.p: Overview: CMI Breakdown dashboard allows CDI Directors and Managers to analyze the trend of Medical CMI and Surgical CMI over time.

The report provides answers to the following questions.
What is the breakdown of medical vs. surgical cases?
What % of reconciled cases were medical?
What is the breakdown of medical vs. surgical CMI?
How is my Medical CMI trending month-to-month?
How is my Surgical CMI trending month-to-month?
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Executive Summary CMI Breakdown .
CMI Breakdown dashboard displays the following:

ul.li: KPI Cards: Overall CMI Before CDI, Overall CMI After CDI, CMI Shift, CMI Shift (%)
Medical and Surgical Cases Chart
CMI Shift Chart
CMI Trend Tabular Chart

conbody.p: On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the charts and table.
For filters on all pages, refer .

entry.p: This metric displays Overall CMI Before CDI report for a period of 3 months by default.

CMI Before CDI = The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) encounters and Reconciliation assessment DRG WT (or Working DRG WT when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria.
This metric displays Overall CMI After CDI report for a period of 3 months by default.

CMI After CDI= The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria.
This metric displays the CMI Shift report for a period of 3 months by default.

CMI Shift = The sum of CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters that meet the report criteria. (Rounded 4 decimal places E.g., 2.1868)/ Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria.
This metric displays CMI Shift (%) for a period of 3 months by default. Rounded to 2 decimal places. E.g. 2.74%.

CMI Shift % = (The sum of CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters that meet the report criteria) / (CMI Before CDI for Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-No Impact, , Reconciled-Impact (SOI/ROM Impact) Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters that meet the report criteria). X 100.

p.b: CMI Breakdown - Medical and Surgical Cases Chart

conbody.p: The ‘Medical and Surgical Cases’ chart displays the volume and percentage of Medical and Surgical cases for each month.

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020, etc.)
Y-axis: Displays the percentage of encounters.

li.p: By default, the chart displays the data for 3 calendar months.

ul.li: Info Icon(text on hover): Medical Cases: Encounters with Final Coded DRG as Medical. Surgical Cases: Encounters with Final Coded DRG as Surgical. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

p.note: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

table.title: Medical and Surgical Cases Chart details

entry.p: Percentage of medical cases for each month.
% Medical Cases = The total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact / Total Reconciled Cases x 100
Tooltip displays 'Reconciled Medical Cases' for each month.
The total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.
Percentage of surgical cases for each month.
% Surgical Cases = The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact / Total Reconciled Cases x 100
Tooltip displays 'Reconciled Surgical Cases' for each month.
The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

conbody.p: The CMI Shift chart displays the Overall CMI Shift, Medical CMI Shift, and Surgical CMI Shift percentages for each month.

ul.li: X-axis: Displays the discharge month in ascending order. (Format: Jun 2020, Jul 2020, etc.)
Y-axis: Displays the shift percentage.

li.p: By default, the chart displays the data for 3 calendar months.

ul.li: Tool-tip: Displays Overall CMI Before, Overall CMI After, Medical CMI Before, Medical CMI After, Surgical CMI Before, and Surgical CMI After for each month.
Info Icon(text on hover): CMI metrics are for all the reconciled cases. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

p.note: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

entry.p: Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)).
Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI /Overall Before CDI) *100
Overall CMI Before
Overall CMI After
Medical CMI Before
Medical CMI After
Surgical CMI Before
Surgical CMI After

Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Medical CMI Shift(%) = (Medical CMI After CDI- Medical CMI Before CDI /Medical Before CDI) *100

Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
Surgical CMI Shift(%) = (Surgical CMI After CDI- Surgical CMI Before CDI /Surgical Before CDI) *100

conbody.p: The CMI Trend chart displays the monthly trend of various CMI metrics.

li.p: By default, the chart displays the data for 3 calendar months.

ul.li: Info icon(text on hover): Data in this chart is for all the reconciled cases. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

p.note: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

row.entry: Discharge month in the format MMM-YYYY (E.g. Jun 2020, Mar 2020)

entry.p: The count of encounters with Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, or Auto Reconcile status.

row.entry:
This metric displays the 'Overall Positive CMI Before CDI' for each month.
The average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Overall CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). / Total count of Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)

This metric displays the 'Overall Positive CMI After CDI' for each month.
The average of Final DRG WTs of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Overall CMI After CDI = Sum of Final DRG WTs of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). / Total count of Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)

Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)).
Rounded to 2 decimal places. E.g. 2.74%.

entry.p: Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI /Overall Before CDI) *100
Count of medical cases for each month.

row.entry: MED Cases = The total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

entry.p: Percentage of surgical cases for each month.
% Medical Cases = The total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact / Total Reconciled Cases x 100

The average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0) / Total count of Medical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)
The average of Final DRG WTs of all medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Med CMI After CDI = Sum of Final DRG WTs of all medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact. / Total count of medical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)

Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Med CMI Shift(%) = (Medical CMI After CDI- Medical CMI Before CDI /Medical Before CDI) *100
Count of surgical cases for each month.

row.entry: SURG Cases = The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

entry.p: Percentage of surgical cases for each month.
% SURG Cases = The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact / Total Reconciled Cases x 100

The average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Surgical CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0) / Total count of Surgical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)

The average of Final DRG WTs of all medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

SURG CMI After CDI = Sum of Final DRG WTs of all surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). / Total count of surgical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)

Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Surgical CMI Shift(%) = (Surgical CMI After CDI- Surgical CMI Before CDI /Surgical Before CDI) *100

ul.li: Displays the discharge date range.
You can select date from the lookup provided.
Default: Last 3 calendar months date range selected by default.
With the Reset button, you can reset the admit date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset the Admit Date.
Displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order that you have access to.
You can select multiple facilities.
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL
Displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities you have access to.
You can select multiple payers.
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL
Displays the available patient types. Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available admit service.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
Displays the available patient types.Example: ED, IP, etc.
You can select multiple Visit Type.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL

li.p: Displays the available DRG Specialties. Example: Transplant, Surgery, Neurosurgery.

ul.li: You can select multiple specialties.
You can search the DRG Specialty.
Default: ALL

entry.p: The avg. of R-DRG WTs (or W-DRG WT if R-DRG is blank) of all Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial Impact) encounters and F-DRG WTs of all Reconciled-No Impact, Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) and Auto Reconciled encounters.

row.entry: The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.

entry.p: CMI Shift = (CMI After - CMI Before);
CMI Shift(%)= (CMI After - CMI Before)/CMI Before X 100. E.g. 3.14%
Medical Cases: Encounters with Final Coded DRG as Medical.
% Medical Cases = (The total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact / Total Reconciled Cases) x 100. E.g. 41%

The avg. of R-DRG WTs (or W-DRG WT if R-DRG is blank) of all Reconciled-Impact (Both, Financial) medical encounters and F-DRG WTs of all Reconciled-No Impact, Reconciled-Impact (SOI/ROM) and Auto Reconciled medical encounters.

row.entry: The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) medical encounters

entry.p: Medical CMI Shift = (Medical CMI After - Medical CMI Before). E.g. 1.3056
Medical CMI Shift(%)= ((Medical CMI After - Medical CMI Before)/Medical CMI Before) X 100. E.g. 3.14%
Surgical Cases: Encounters with Final Coded DRG as Surgical.
% Surgical Cases = The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact / Total Reconciled Cases x 100. E.g. 65%

The avg. of R-DRG WTs (or W-DRG WT if R-DRG is blank) of all Reconciled-Impact (Both, Financial) surgical encounters and F-DRG WTs of all Reconciled-No Impact, Reconciled-Impact (SOI/ROM) and Auto Reconciled surgical encounters.

row.entry: The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) surgical encounters.

entry.p: Surgical CMI Shift = (Surgical CMI After - Surgical CMI Before). E.g. 1.3056
Surgical CMI Shift(%)= ((Surgical CMI After - Surgical CMI Before)/Surgical CMI Before X 100. E.g. 3.14%
